ticker.title: Market Ticker List
ticker.subtitle: Pick which assets appear in the scrolling ticker bar at the top.
ticker.emptyHint: Pick assets from the categories below to add them to your list.

scope.title: Ticker Bar Visibility
scope.subtitle: On which pages should the ticker bar appear?
scope.allPagesDesc: Wherever you go, the ticker bar stays sticky on top.
scope.homeOnlyDesc: The ticker bar appears only when the dashboard (home) is open.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Get an email when a price alarm triggers.
notifications.emailEnabledDesc: Active — when alarms trigger, you'll receive an email at your registered address.
notifications.emailDisabledDesc: Disabled — alarms still trigger but no email is sent.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Two-factor authentication (2FA) settings.
security.enabledDesc: Active — login asks for an additional verification code.
security.disabledDesc: Disabled — sign in with password only.
security.enableHint: Once enabled, your next sign-in will prompt setup via an Authenticator app.
